title: arenaria tetraquetra var. willkommii
intro: Arenaria tetraquetra var. willkommii, also known as Sandwort, is a low-growing, perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its anthraquinone glycosides and flavonoids content. The health benefits of Arenaria tetraquetra var. willkommii include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve constipation, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
